title: narcissus bicolor var. lorifolius
intro: Narcissus bicolor var. lorifolius, also known as the 'Loripedes Daffodil', is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Narcissus bicolor var. lorifolius are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant's bulbs and flowers can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
